title: Finite Shifted QR Step Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite shifted-QR bad next-step entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact shifted-QR replay reads A1[1,1] as 8/5 while a malformed row claims 2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional shifted QR rows only when they add distinct shift-selection, deflation, Hessenberg, convergence, residual-bound, or floating-point stability pressure; keep shift strategy, Schur convergence, and numerical stability claims in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational shift, A0, Q, Q^T, R, A1, trace, determinant, and similarity rows as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false shifted next-step entry row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay reads the conflicting entry.
Expose the pack through the matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep shift selection, deflation, Schur convergence, loss-of-orthogonality analysis, and floating-point stability claims marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
